# Skill Harness Contract

| Situation | Skill |
|---|---|
| New campaign | `guarantee-campaign-builder` |
| No conversions | `no-conversion-debugger` |
| Need offer | `offer-certainty-engine` |
| Need proof path | `proof-path-builder` |
| Need channel choice | `channel-market-fit-router` |
| Need measurement | `incrementality-measurement-planner` |
| Need memory update | `markdown-growth-memory-updater` |
| Need scale decision | `kill-scale-budget-decider` |

Every skill should output Markdown artifacts, not just advice.
